name: Frisian Draughts
author: AGP port (Frisian draughts / Frysk dammen)
description: Frisian draughts (Frysk dammen) on a 10x10 board: men and flying kings capture along the diagonals AND the orthogonals (all 8 directions); mandatory weighted-maximum capture (most pieces, then most kings); end-of-move promotion. Leave the opponent with no legal move to win.
